# Pull Request

## 🔗 Related Issue

Closes #
(Always link the issue this PR resolves)

---

# 📌 Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance Improvement

---

# 📝 Description

Provide a clear and concise description of what this PR introduces.

Include:
- What was added/changed
- Why it was needed
- Any architectural decisions

---

# 🧠 Technical Details

Explain implementation details:

- What files were modified?
- Any new services/modules introduced?
- Any changes to state or event flow?
- Any database changes?

---

# 🧪 How to Test in progress

Provide steps to test locally:

1.
2.
3.

Expected result:

---

# 📷 Screenshots (if UI related)

Add screenshots or screen recordings if applicable.

---

# ⚠️ Breaking Changes

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking change (explain below)

If breaking:
Explain impact and migration steps.

---

# 🛡 Security Considerations

- [ ] No sensitive data exposed
- [ ] RLS policies respected
- [ ] API keys not leaked
- [ ] Input validated

---

# 📋 Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles
- [ ] Lint passes
- [ ] TypeScript passes
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Follows project structure
- [ ] Linked to correct Issue
- [ ] Tested manually

---

# 🚀 Impact

What part of the system does this affect?

- [ ] UI
- [ ] Game Logic
- [ ] Store
- [ ] Supabase
- [ ] AI Integration
- [ ] Deployment

---

# 📦 Deployment Notes

Anything special needed before merging?

---

# 👀 Review Focus

Where should reviewers focus?

Example:
- EventBus usage
- Store mutation logic
- RLS policy correctness
- Edge function security
